title: Reserved For Drinks Solid Oak Coaster Set. Gift set, in a box, set of two (Grandma and Grandad)
features: Reserved for Grandma and Grandad Solid Oak Coaster Gift Set. Compromises 2 Oak Coasters in a gift box
One Centimetre thick Solid Oak Coasters with a funny saying, Wooden keepsake gift for Nana and Granddad
Great Size Coaster. At 10cm x 10cm, each drink mat is capable of hosting pretty much any cup, mug or glass.
Ready For Gifting. Because the coasters are gift boxed and tied with a ribbon, all you need to do is hand it over to Gran and Grandpa!
Made In The UK. We design and print the Coasters in the UK, then package them in the gift boxes.
description: Product Description Reserved For Hubby and Wifey’s Drink Solid Oak Coaster Set. Wedding Gifts, Anniversary Present, Couple set. Christmas set for Mum and Dad. Reserved for Hubby and Wifey's Drink Solid Oak Coaster Set. Lovely pair of robust coasters, Perfect as a newly wed gift, anniversary present or Christmas gift. The coasters are nestled in a satin lined box and wrapped with ribbon, all ready for gifting. The fun message also shows when their beverage needs replenishing! About the Coaster Set Each a substantial 10cm x 10cm these stunning wooden coasters are a comfortable size for most glasses or Mugs. Made from the off cuts from Oak Staircases, using parts that would otherwise be thrown away, the coasters have individual grain, although we hand select the closest matches in our boxed sets. The design is printed onto the coaster, and then a clear coat is applied to seal the surface ready for use. Four Felt Feet Four Felt Feet are attached to the bottom of the coaster to help prevent slippage and reduce scratching of surfaces. The Slang term Hubby was first seen in the 1680's with Wifey being used more recently to complement the term. These coasters happily showasce these cute honorifics. Care for The Coaster To clean simply wipe over the surface of the Reserved for Hubby or Wifey’s Drink Solid Oak coaster with a damp cloth and buff with a dry cloth to keep them looking great for years to come! Made in The UK We design, print and package the Reserved for Hubby and Wifey’s Drink Solid Oak Coaster Sets in the UK.
